prompt: Create a realistic candid street-fashion photograph of a smiling young woman with dark hair in a messy bun walking through a sunny suburban shopping-center parking lot at midday. She is centered slightly left in a wide horizontal frame, laughing and looking off to her left, wearing small black oval sunglasses, a black halter-style tube crop top with a large grayscale cat face wearing sunglasses printed on the front, and high-waisted loose black pinstripe trousers. She has visible arm tattoos, a black smartwatch, a small shiny silver shoulder bag on a chain strap, and she carries two discrete handheld items: 1) a flat brown cardboard takeout box in her left hand, and 2) car keys plus black sunglasses dangling from her right hand. The environment includes rows of parked cars on both sides, leafy green trees, a brick-and-stucco retail building with shaded storefronts on the left, bright blue sky, strong natural sunlight, crisp shadows, and shallow depth of field with the background softly blurred. Use a natural documentary look, 35mm lens perspective, realistic skin texture, authentic motion, warm summer color grading, no text, no watermark, no posed studio lighting.
promptEn: Create a realistic candid street-fashion photograph of a smiling young woman with dark hair in a messy bun walking through a sunny suburban shopping-center parking lot at midday. She is centered slightly left in a wide horizontal frame, laughing and looking off to her left, wearing small black oval sunglasses, a black halter-style tube crop top with a large grayscale cat face wearing sunglasses printed on the front, and high-waisted loose black pinstripe trousers. She has visible arm tattoos, a black smartwatch, a small shiny silver shoulder bag on a chain strap, and she carries two discrete handheld items: 1) a flat brown cardboard takeout box in her left hand, and 2) car keys plus black sunglasses dangling from her right hand. The environment includes rows of parked cars on both sides, leafy green trees, a brick-and-stucco retail building with shaded storefronts on the left, bright blue sky, strong natural sunlight, crisp shadows, and shallow depth of field with the background softly blurred. Use a natural documentary look, 35mm lens perspective, realistic skin texture, authentic motion, warm summer color grading, no text, no watermark, no posed studio lighting.
promptZh: 创作一张写实的街拍风格抓拍照片，主体为 一位留着深色乱发丸子头、面带微笑的年轻女性，正走在正午阳光明媚的郊区购物中心停车场。她位于宽幅横向构图的左侧，正笑着看向左方，佩戴着黑色小号椭圆太阳镜，身穿黑色挂脖式抹胸短上衣，正面印有戴着太阳镜的灰色猫脸图案，下身搭配高腰宽松黑色细条纹长裤。她手臂上有明显的纹身，佩戴黑色智能手表，肩背一个小巧闪亮的银色链条包，手中拿着两样物品：1）左手拿着一个扁平的棕色纸质外卖盒，2）右手拎着车钥匙和一副黑色太阳镜。环境包括两侧停放的车辆、绿树、左侧带有阴凉店面的砖石结构零售建筑、湛蓝的天空、强烈的自然光、清晰的阴影，以及背景虚化的浅景深效果。采用自然的纪实风格，35mm 镜头视角，真实的皮肤质感，自然的动态感，温暖的夏季色调，无文字，无水印，无摆拍的影棚灯光。
